programme.title: Pulp Fiction, (1994, Thriller)
programme.desc: Writer-director Quentin Tarantino delivers an iconic cast of characters in PULP FICTION, a wildly entertaining tale of violence and redemption. John Travolta, Samuel L. Jackson, Uma Thurman, and Bruce Willis star in this pop culture phenomenon.

programme.title: MAFIA, (2013, Action)
programme.desc: In the 1970s, a fierce crime boss (Ving Rhames) wreaks havoc on the streets. Detective Womack (Pam Grier) decides to put an end to this organized crime – even if it means breaking the law.

programme.title: Thief, (1981, Crime)
programme.desc: Michael Mann directs this stylishly photographed action-packed drama that stars James Caan as a master safe cracker who is planning his last heist for the sake of a woman (Tuesday Weld).

programme.title: Marlowe, (2023, Crime)
programme.desc: Marlowe, a gripping thriller set in 1939 LA. Hard-boiled private eye, Philip Marlowe, is hired to find the lover of a glamorous heiress. Unexpectedly, Marlowe finds himself embroiled in a deadly mystery that he's determined to either solve or die trying.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction, (1994, Thriller)
programme.desc: Writer-director Quentin Tarantino delivers an iconic cast of characters in PULP FICTION, a wildly entertaining tale of violence and redemption. John Travolta, Samuel L. Jackson, Uma Thurman, and Bruce Willis star in this pop culture phenomenon.

programme.title: Bugsy, (1991, Drama)
programme.desc: A cold-blooded killer who dreamed of Hollywood stardom, a crazed patriot who plotted against Mussolini, and the brilliant visionary who carved Las Vegas out of the dry Nevada desert, Bugsy had it all. Rating: R

programme.title: The Boondock Saints, (1999, Thriller)
programme.desc: Two Irish Catholic brothers become vigilantes and wipe out Boston's criminal underworld in the name of God.

programme.title: The Boondock Saints, (1999, Thriller)
programme.desc: Two Irish Catholic brothers become vigilantes and wipe out Boston's criminal underworld in the name of God.

programme.title: Overnight, (2003, Documentary)
programme.desc: A documentary on the rise and stumble of Troy Duffy, the bartender-cum-filmmaker who was swept up by Miramax's Harvey Weinstein to turn his script for The Boondock Saints into a feature film.

programme.title: Troll 2, (1991, Supernatural Horror)
programme.desc: Trolls live in the woods around Nibog and feed on the town's population. By transforming themselves into people, the trolls are able to come into town and pick their menu.

programme.title: Best Worst Movie, (2010, Documentary)
programme.desc: Years after the making of TROLL 2, the film's grown-up child star pays a hilarious, offbeat homage to lovers of bad movies and the people that make them.

programme.title: The Mole Agent, (2020, Drama)
programme.desc: When a family grows concerned for their mother’s well-being in a retirement home, private investigator Romulo hires 83-year-old Sergio to become a new resident and a mole inside the home.

programme.title: Jiro Dreams Of Sushi, (2015, Documentary)
programme.desc: A thoughtful and elegant meditation on work, family and the art of perfection, chronicling Jiro Ono’s life as both an unparalleled success in the culinary world and a loving yet complicated father.

programme.title: Grizzly Man, (2005, Documentary)
programme.desc: Werner Herzog (Cave of Forgotten Dreams) crafts a compelling documentary look at wildlife preservationist Timothy Treadwell, who lived unarmed among grizzly bears in Alaska.

programme.title: Point Break, (1991, Action)
programme.desc: An F.B.I. Agent goes undercover to catch a gang of surfers who may be bank robbers.

programme.title: Hotel Mumbai, (2019, Thriller)
programme.desc: Vividly recounts the 2008 siege of the Taj Hotel by a group of terrorists in Mumbai. The dedicated hotel staff risk their lives to protect their guests as a desperate couple is forced to do the unthinkable to protect their child.

programme.title: Point Break, (1991, Action)
programme.desc: An F.B.I. Agent goes undercover to catch a gang of surfers who may be bank robbers.

programme.title: State of Grace, (1990, Crime)
programme.desc: In this neo-noir crime film, an undercover cop (Sean Penn) comes back to his old neighborhood in New York City's Hell's Kitchen to bring down the Irish Mafia, which is now led by two of his childhood friends (Gary Oldman and Ed Harris).

programme.title: Judgment Night, (1993, Thriller)
programme.desc: Four young friends, while taking a shortcut en route to a local boxing match, witness a brutal murder which leaves them running for their lives.

programme.title: Men at Work, (1990, Action Comedies)
programme.desc: Two garbage men's lives are turned upside down when they discover the city commitioner's body in a trash bin on their route. Over the next 24 hours, they frantically try to keep the body hidden, elude underworld goons and find the real killer.

programme.title: The Arrival, (1996, Thriller)
programme.desc: Radio astronomer Zane Zaminsky believes he has picked up a cosmic noise that signals extraterrestrial intelligence. His desperate search for answers leads him to discover that aliens are already on Earth and in the process of preparing to take it over.

programme.title: Benny & Joon, (2006, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: Johnny Depp and Mary Stuart Masterson star in this quirky romantic Drama about two misfits who Comedye together as a result of an unusual poker game. Aidan Quinn and Julianne Moore co-star.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Bogus Journey, (1991, Comedy)
programme.desc: In this sequel to BILL & TED'S EXCELLENT ADVENTURE, the dimwitted duo travel to Heaven, Hell and points in between as they meet (among others) Albert Einstein, the Easter Bunny and the Grim Reaper.

programme.title: Sleepy Hollow, (1999, Fantasy)
programme.desc: Johnny Depp is Ichabod Crane, an investigator determined to stop the murderous Headless Horseman.

programme.title: The Gambler, (1974, Thriller)
programme.desc: James Caan portrays a compulsive gambler who can't quit or win. He falls into debt to the mob for $40,000 but seems to relish the thrill of gambling against the long shot.

programme.title: The Harder They Come, (1972, Action)
programme.desc: Reggae legend Jimmy Cliff stars as Ivan Martin, an aspiring singer hoping to make a name for himself. Robbed of his money and possessions, he finds work with a self-righteous preacher

programme.desc: In this epic tale of adventure and revenge, Lee Marvin and Roger Moore are recruited by the WW I allied forces to take on a German battleship! An exciting mix of humor, action and the unique chemistry shared between two of Hollywood's finest stars.

programme.title: Saturday Night Fever, (1976, Music)
programme.desc: John Travolta performs as the troubled Tony Manero - Brooklyn paint store clerk by day and undisputed king of the dance floor by night. A powerful and provocative urban tragedy that carries as much significance today as it did in 1977.

programme.title: After an explosive battle with Wapol, Luffy begins the tiring process of convincing Chopper to join his pirate gang.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Hiriluk's Cherry Blossoms! Miracle in the Drum Rockies!

programme.title: Chopper sets sail for Alabasta with his new friends, and Dalton thinks back to his first meeting with Princess Vivi.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Goodbye Drum Island! I'm Going Out to Sea!

programme.title: The Straw Hats rescue a man of many faces as they approach Alabasta. Sure, he’s good for a laugh, but they may regret pulling him out of the drink.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Alabasta's Hero and a Ballerina on the Ship!

programme.title: The Straw Hats arrive in Alabasta with precious little time to stop the rebellion. Sanji and Chopper are sent to gather supplies for a dangerous trip across the desert.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Off to the Desert Kingdom! The Rain-Summoning Powder and the Rebel army!

programme.title: Captain Smoker has Luffy in his grasp until a fiery stranger creates a diversion, giving the Straw Hats a chance to make a break for it.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Heroes' Reunion! His Name is Fire Fist Ace!

programme.title: Ace and Luffy’s happy reunion is crudely interrupted by the Billions of Baroque Works. They may be outnumbered, but these brothers are no ordinary pirates!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Ace and Luffy! Hot Emotions and Brotherly Bonds!

programme.title: Before they can start their trek across the desert, Luffy and the Straw Hats are stopped at the shore by the cute – but formidable – Kung Fu Dugongs.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Erumalu, the City of Green and the Kung Fu Dugongs!

programme.title: Luffy’s crew encounters treacherous birds and man-eating foliage on its desert odyssey, and just when they think the coast is clear, a great disturbance emerges from beneath the sand!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Adventure in the Country of Sand! The Monsters that Live in the Scorching Land!

programme.title: The Straw Hats cross paths with the Barbar Sand Pirates, and Ace runs into big trouble when he gets separated from the group.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Enter the Desert Pirates! The Men Who Live Freely!

programme.title: Princess Vivi devises a plan to test the hearts of a gang of so-called rebels. They talk a good game, but will their bite measure up to their bark?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: False Fortitude! Camu, Rebel Soldier at Heart!

programme.title: The Straw Hats continue their journey to Yuba, where a bittersweet reunion with a childhood friend awaits Princess Vivi.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Rebel Warrior Koza! The Dream vowed to Vivi!

programme.title: Fire Fist Ace is hired by two young boys to hunt down and capture a lethal bounty hunter known only as the Scorpion.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Showdown in a Heat Haze! Ace vs. the Gallant Scorpion!

programme.title: Chopper, Zoro, and Luffy get separated from the others. When the heat makes Luffy act even stranger than usual, his friends wonder if they joined the right pirate gang.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Ruins and Lost Ways! Vivi, Her Friends and the Country's Form!

programme.title: The assassins of Baroque Works gather at Spider’s Café, and the Straw Hats arrive at Yuba only to find it buried in sand.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Spiders Caf? at 8 o'Clock! The Enemy Leaders Gather!

programme.title: Crocodile reveals himself to the Baroque Works assassins and discloses his dastardly plan for Alabasta. After departing Yuba, Luffy takes a stand that forces Vivi to rethink her mission.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Luffy vs. Vivi! The Tearful Vow to Put Friends on the Line

programme.title: Vivi takes Luffy’s advice, and the Straw Hats head towards Rainbase for a confrontation with Crocodile. Karoo finally reaches the palace with Vivi’s warning for King Cobra.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Battlefront of Alabasta! Rainbase, the City of Dreams

programme.title: Luffy leads a daring – but foolish – raid on Crocodile’s casino. His poor planning lands him behind bars with Captain Smoker – and more importantly, leaves Vivi unprotected.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Trap of Certain Defeat! Storming Raindinners!

programme.title: While the Straw Hats are stuck in the clink, King Cobra addresses the starving people of Nanohana. Will his unbelievable revelation drive his subjects past the brink of rebellion?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Operation Utopia Commences! The Swell of Rebellion Stirs!

programme.title: A royal imposter has the rebel army hell-bent on bringing Cobra’s reign to a violent end. Meanwhile, Luffy and his mates find themselves in deep trouble and even deeper water.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Terrifying Banana Gators and Mr. Prince!

programme.title: Sanji shows up in the nick of time to make the crocs cough up the key to Luffy’s freedom, but the ravenous reptiles spit up something else instead.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Key to a Great Comeback Escape! The Wax-Wax Ball!

programme.title: Crocodile snatches Vivi off the back of a giant crab, but Luffy’s not having it. The rubber-man goes toe-to-toe with the sandman in a battle that will end in bloodshed.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Merciless Mortal Combat! Luffy vs Crocodile

programme.title: Crocodile puts Luffy down for a never-ending dirt nap, and the Straw Hats get a lift from a crabby ally in their race to stop the looming rebellion.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Dash For a Miracle! Alabasta Animal Land

programme.title: Vivi arrives in Alubarna with just enough time to stop the rebellion, but the agents of Baroque Works lurk in every corner, waiting to sabotage her plans for peace.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Rebel Army vs. Royal Army! Showdown at Alubarna

programme.title: Sanji buys Vivi some time by mixing it up with a foe of many faces. Outside Alubarna’s walls, Chopper and Usopp tangle with Miss Merry Christmas and her slugging sidekick.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Alubarna Grieves! The Fierce Captain Karoo

programme.title: Usopp finally shows some courage by using a five-ton hammer to play whack-a-mole with Miss Merry Christmas. He may be bluffing, but the distraction lets Chopper zero in on the enemy’s weakness.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Sworn on a Friend's Dream! The Battle of Molehill, Block 4

programme.title: Chopper’s Rumble Ball could be the difference between life and death in the mole ballgame. Elsewhere, Sanji has trouble kicking a pretty enemy, and Vivi proposes something unthinkable.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Big Opening Day Today! The Copy-Copy Montage

programme.title: Vivi continues preparations to blow up the palace; Zorro puts his steel to the test against a lethal blade-man; Sanji tries to overcome his inability to kick a foxy lady!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Transformed into Nami! Bon Clay's Rapid-Fire Ballet Kenpo!

programme.title: Things don’t look good for the prettiest Straw Hat. Nami’s about to tangle with a thorny adversary, and the weapon Usopp built her is only good for party tricks!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Nami's Cyclone Advisory! Clima Tact Burst!

programme.title: Crocodile reveals his sinister motives for attacking Alabasta, and Nami tries to end her duel with Miss Doublefinger by unleashing the Clima Tact’s ultimate weapon: a devastatingly lethal tornado!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Secret Passed Down In The Royal Family! The Ancient Weapon Pluton!

programme.title: Zoro hopes to attain a new level of strength when he fights a foe with a body made of blades. The Straw Hat sword-slinger is determined to become a man who can cut steel – or die trying.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Secret Of Powerful Swordplay! Ability To Cut Steel And The Rhythm Things Have!

programme.title: Koza – the leader of the rebel army – finally discovers the evil mastermind behind Alabasta’s drought, but is he too late to prevent further bloodshed?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Battle is Over! Koza Raises the White Flag!

programme.title: When Koza is mysteriously shot, the rebellion is reborn, but Vivi’s cries for a cease-fire fall on deaf ears until a long-overdue hero swoops to the rescue!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Where Vivi's Voice Gets Heard! The Hero Descends!

programme.title: Luffy finally discovers the secret to knocking out a sandman, but it won’t matter unless Vivi and the rest of the Straw Hats can locate the Baroque Works bomber.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Sand Croc and Water Luffy!... The Second Round of the Duel!

programme.title: Dose dupla, (2013)
programme.desc: 2013. Dois agentes especiais precisam se unir contra um cartel de drogas mexicano depois que uma operação secreta acaba gerando resultados catastróficos. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Denzel Washington, Mark Wahlberg, Paula Patton Diretor: Baltasar Kormákur

programme.title: Sem Lei, (2011)
programme.desc: 2011. Um grupo de três amigos planeja um grande roubo que acaba dando errado quando um deles se revela um traidor. Enganado, Sonny decide assumir o problema de frente e busca vingança contra o antigo parceiro. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Bruce, Phillippe, Ryan, Willis Diretor: Mike Gunther

programme.title: B13-U 13º Distrito - Ultimato, (2004)
programme.desc: 2004. Damien e Leito estão retornando ao Distrito 13 em uma missão para levar a paz ao setor controlado por cinco líderes de gangues diferentes, antes que os serviços secretos da cidade tomem medidas drásticas para resolver o problema. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Cyril Raffaelli, David Belle, Philippe Torreton Diretor: Patrick Alessandrin

programme.title: Fogo contra Fogo, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Um bombeiro fora de serviço testemunha um assassinato nas mãos de uma gangue de gangsters. Ele entra no programa de proteção a testemunhas até depor, mas não pode se esconder por muito tempo da gangue, então decide agir por conta própria. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Josh Duhamel, Bruce Willis, Rosario Dawson Diretor: David Barrett

programme.title: Carga Explosiva 3, (2008)
programme.desc: 2008. Frank Martin é obrigado a conduzir Valentina, a filha de Leonid Vasilev, o chefe da Agência de Proteção Ambiental da Ucrânia, de Marselha a Odessa, além de dois sacos de conteúdo suspeito. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Jason Statham, Robert Knepper, Natalya Rudakova, François Berléand, Jeroen Krabbé, Alex Kobold, David Atrakchi, Yann Sundberg, Eriq Ebouaney, David Kammenos Diretor: Olivier Megaton

programme.title: O Anjo da Morte, (2012)
programme.desc: 2012. Um policial disfarçado se aproxima de seu inimigo. Ela decide deixar um agente de confiança entrar em campo, mas tem dúvidas se ela tem o que é preciso para completar a missão. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Steven Seagal, Sarah Lind Diretor: Keoni Waxman

programme.title: Entrevista com Hitman, (2012)
programme.desc: 2012. Não confie em ninguém, seja frio e nunca perca. Estas são as regras básicas que serviu de base para um assassino profissional se tornasse um dos melhores em seu ramo. Criado nos guetos da Romênia, Victor sabe o valor da vida mais que qualquer um. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Luke Goss, Caroline Tillette, Stephen Marcus, Danny Midwinter..., Patrick Lyster, Philip Whitchurch, Elliot Greene, Danny Midwinter, René Zagger, Ray Panthaki Diretor: Perry Bhandal

programme.title: Sobreviva a Noite, (2019)
programme.desc: 2019. Um intenso filme de ação, que traz Dolph Lundgren como um agente da Interpol protegendo sua esposa e filha de um criminoso implacável e seus mercenários em um vilarejo italiano. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Dolph Lundgren, Hal Yamanouchi, Natalie Burn, Ralph Palka, Mario Opinato, Brice Martinet, Andrea Scarduzio Diretor: Giorgio Bruno

programme.title: O Legionário, (1998)
programme.desc: 1998. Na Marselha dos anos 20, lutador de boxe vence luta que deveria perder de propósito. Para fugir dos gângsters que buscam vingança, resolve se alistar na Legião Estrangeira, onde enfrenta os horrores da batalha no inóspito deserto do Marrocos. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Jean-Claude Van Damme, Adewale Akinnuoye-Agbaje, Steven Berkoff, Nicholas Farrell, Jim Carter, Ana Sofrenovic, Daniel Caltagirone, Joseph Long, Mario ..., Mario Kalli Diretor: Peter MacDonald

programme.title: Blitz, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Blitz é um serial killer de Londres que está matando policiais. O inspetor-chefe Roberts e o sargento Brant, um detetive de polícia duro, inflexível e politicamente incorreto, terão a tarefa de tentar deter o psicopata. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Jason Statham, Paddy Considine, Aidan Gillen, David Riley Diretor: Elliott Lester, Jordan Hill

programme.title: B13-U 13º Distrito - Ultimato, (2004)
programme.desc: 2004. Damien e Leito estão retornando ao Distrito 13 em uma missão para levar a paz ao setor controlado por cinco líderes de gangues diferentes, antes que os serviços secretos da cidade tomem medidas drásticas para resolver o problema. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Cyril Raffaelli, David Belle, Philippe Torreton Diretor: Patrick Alessandrin

programme.title: O Sequestro do Ônibus 657, (2015)
programme.desc: 2015. Um pai não tem meios para pagar o tratamento médico da filha. Como último recurso, ele se une a um colega de trabalho ganancioso para roubar um cassino. Quando as coisas dão errado, eles são forçados a sequestrar um ônibus da cidade. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Robert De Niro, Jeffrey Dean Morgan, Kate Bosworth, Dave Bautista, Stephen Cyrus Sepher, Gina Carano, Morris Chestnut, Lydia Hull, Mark-Paul Gosselaar, D.B. Sweeney Diretor: Scott Mann

programme.title: Redenção, (2013)
programme.desc: 2013. Jason Statham é um veterano de guerra que assume uma nova identidade enquanto tenta se vingar dos assassinos de sua namorada grávida. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Agata Buzek, Jason Statham Diretor: Steven Knight

programme.title: Blitz, (2020)

programme.title: Refém, (2005)

Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Bruce Willis, Ben Foster, Jonathan Tucker, Jimmy Bennett, Michelle Horn, Marshall Allman, Kevin Pollak, Rumer Willis, Robert Knepper, Kim Coates Diretor: Florent-Emilio Siri

programme.title: Ruas Em Guerra, (2019)
programme.desc: 2019. Quando o implacável Lord Rincon e sua gangue MS-13 recrutam Miguel, de 10 anos, para trabalhar como um de seus entregadores de drogas, Lucas, irmão mais velho de Miguel e que também trabalha para o bandido, está desesperado para manter o garoto seguro. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Jean-Claude Van Damme, David Castañeda, Elijah Rodriguez, Nicholas Sean Johnny, Charlie MacGechan, Joana Metrass, Dean John-Wilson, Jim Caesar, Kerry Bennett, Uriel Emil Pollack Diretor: Lior Geller

programme.title: Revólver, (2005)

programme.title: A recompensa, (2013)
programme.desc: 2013. Dom Hemingway, um notório arrombador de cofres, está de volta às ruas de Londres após doze anos de prisão; é hora de cobrar o que ele deve por manter a boca fechada. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Demian Bichir, Emilia Clarke, Jude Law, Richard E. Grant Diretor: Richard Shepard

programme.title: Os Espartalhões, (2008)
programme.desc: 2008. Paródia de "300" e outros filmes. O rei Leônidas e seu exército de 12 homens lutam contra Xerxes da Pérsia para defender a liberdade de Esparta. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Sean Maguire, Carmen Electra, Kevin Sorbo, Diedrich Bader, Ken Davitian Diretor: Jason Friedberg, Aaron Seltzer

programme.title: Chef, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Carl Casper, um chef que perde o emprego por se recusar a aceitar as exigências do dono, empreende um projeto de venda de alimentos em um caminhão com sua ex-mulher e seu melhor amigo. Ao mesmo tempo, ele também tentará reunir sua família. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Jon Favreau, Robert Downey Jr., Scarlett Johansson Diretor: Jon Favreau

programme.title: O Grande Dave, (2008)
programme.desc: 2008. Tripulação de aliens em miniatura opera uma nave espacial com forma humana. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Eddie Murphy, Elizabeth Banks, Judah Friedlander, Marc Blucas, Gabrielle Union, Scott Caan, Pat Kilbane, Ed Helms, Kevin Hart, Mike O'Malley Diretor: Brian Robbins

programme.title: O Matador, (2006)
programme.desc: 2006. Um matador solitário forma uma improvável amizade com um empresário em crise. programme.title: Onde está o dinheiro?, (2017)
programme.desc: 2017. Um jovem astuto e inteligente das ruas do sul de Los Angeles precisa entrar em uma comunidade de brancos para recuperar uma grande quantia de dinheiro roubado. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Terry Crews, Mike Epps, Method Man, Josh Brener Diretor: Scotty Zabielski

programme.title: Show de Vizinha, (2004)
programme.desc: 2004. Um estudante do ensino médio se apaixona por sua vizinha, e descobre que ela é uma atriz pornô. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Emile Hirsch, Elisha Cuthbert, Timothy Olyphant Diretor: Luke Greenfield

programme.title: O Julgamento do Diabo, (2007)
programme.desc: 2007. Jabez Stone, escritor fracassado, faz um pacto com o diabo para alcançar fama e fortuna. Contudo, ao perceber o custo de sua decisão, ele luta para recuperar sua alma, enfrentando um julgamento final que desafia seus valores. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Anthony Hopkins, Alec Baldwin, Jennifer Love Hewitt, Ken Murton, Dan Aykroyd, Gregg Bello, Frank Sivero, Kim Cattrall, John Savage, Al Palagonia Diretor: Alec Baldwin

programme.title: A Família, (2013)

programme.title: Golpe de Gênio, (2009)

programme.desc: 1998. Diretor de presídio obriga dois homens a se casarem com suas filhas, por acreditar que elas estejam grávidas. Os novos cunhados decidem roubar um trem e fugir. Enquanto isso, uma agente do FBI chega à cidade para investigar a morte de um prisioneiro. Gêneros: Crime Elenco: Marlon Brando, Donald Sutherland, Charlie Sheen, Thomas Haden Church, Mira Sorvino, Martin Sheen, David Arquette, Jean-Pierre Bergeron, Rémy Girard, R... Diretor: Yves Simoneau

programme.title: Trumbo - Lista Negra, (1970)

programme.title: Guerra sob a Terra, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Durante a Primeira Guerra Mundial, o coronel Hellfire Jack traça um plano ousado. Ele recruta um grupo de mineiros locais para cavar um túnel, das trincheiras aliadas às trincheiras alemãs, na esperança de detonar bombas sob o inimigo e ter vantagem. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Punhos da Vingança, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um campeão de artes marciais é forçado a abandonar a aposentadoria para uma última luta, a fim de desvendar uma grande conspiração. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Assassinos Anônimos, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. A tensão está insuportável dentro da Assassinos Anônimos, um grupo de apoio para matadores, quando todos estão tentando descobrir qual deles está por trás de um atentado contra um importante senador. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Ring - O Chamado, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um vídeo com imagens apavorantes, que leva a um telefonema prevendo a morte de quem o assiste. Uma repórter não acredita até assistir ao vídeo. Agora ela precisa desvendar o mistério antes que o seu tempo acabe. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Um Estado de Liberdade, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Newt Knight, um bravo agricultor do Mississippi, se junta a outros fazendeiros e lidera um grupo de escravos fugitivos durante a Guerra Civil nos Estados Unidos. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Departamento Q - O Efeito Marco, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um detetive e seu assistente investigam a história de um menino de 12 anos que está desaparecido. Ao começarem as buscas, descobrem uma rede de corrupção internacional utilizando os fundos do governo destinados ao desenvolvimento da África. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Linhas Inimigas, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em novembro de 1943, um esquadrão de guerra britânico se junta a um oficial americano em uma missão secreta atrás das linhas inimigas na congelada Polônia devastada pela guerra, com a intenção de resgatar um cientista polonês das mãos dos nazistas. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: American Sicario, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O gângster americano Erik Vasquez planeja se tornar o principal chefe do submundo mexicano, mas acaba fazendo inimigos tanto entre poderosos cartéis quanto entre seus aliados. Seu casamento com Gloria, que está grávida, se deteriora. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Gata Selvagem, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Luis Mário pensa em casar sem amor pois sofre por Camélia, sua ex-esposa; María Julia, decidida, abandona os filhos e Anselmo, pai de Rosaura. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Gata Selvagem, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Rosaura inaugura sua nova casa; Claudia, filha de Dona Cruz, não está convencida de que Karina seja Rosaura. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Gata Selvagem, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Jimena vai à casa de Rosaura para oferecer apoio a Anselmo e seus filhos, escondendo sua grande solidão. Iván, irmão de Rosaura, é gentil com ela. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Gata Selvagem, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Eduarda organiza seu aniversário, seu plano é deixar Luís Mário constrangido; Eva e sua amiga Valéria dão um show; Karina foge para uma festa; Claudia a vê. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Gata Selvagem, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um novo conflito provoca uma rixa entre Luis Mario e Rosaura. Ela queria vingança, mas tudo dá muito errado; Karina manipula Doña Cruz e a coloca contra Cláudia. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Gata Selvagem, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Eva leva Luis Mário à praia, sabendo que Bruno trabalha lá; Camélia e Patrício perdem muito dinheiro no cassino. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Gata Selvagem, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Claudia planeja contratar um detetive para Karina. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Enquanto Houver Esperança, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Angélica é uma adolescente de 16 anos que luta contra uma forma rara de câncer. E, enquanto seus pais batalham para custear seu tratamento e ganhar mais tempo de vida para a garota, ela se apaixona pela primeira vez. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Um Lobo em Pele de Cordeiro, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em uma terra mágica, em um prado calmo onde ovelhas podem viver sem preocupações, problemas começam a aparecer quando uma alcateia se estabeleceu nas proximidades. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Bons de Bico, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Dois perus rivais encontram uma máquina do tempo e fazem uma viagem maluca ao passado, para o século XVII, para tentar retirar o peru do cardápio tradicional do Dia de Ação de Graças. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Delicadeza do Amor, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma bela jovem perde o marido em um terrível acidente. Inconsolável, ela decide mergulhar de cabeça no trabalho, se dedicando de forma integral. No entanto, um beijo sem motivo aparente em um colega muda essa situação. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Muito Bem Acompanhada, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Para fazer ciúmes ao ex-namorado e forjar uma vida romântica de sucesso, uma mulher contrata um garoto de programa para acompanhá-la ao casamento de sua irmã mais nova em Londres. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Todos os Caminhos Levam a Roma, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Maggie embarca em uma viagem para Itália, com Summer, sua filha adolescente. Mas ao chegar lá, Summer foge roubando o carro da mãe. Maggie contará com a ajuda de um ex-namorado para encontrar a filha. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Um Porto Seguro, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma mulher misteriosa se muda para uma pequena cidade e recomeça sua vida. Apesar da moça estar determinada a não formar laços afetivos na nova cidade, ela não consegue cumprir esse objetivo e acaba levantando questionamentos sobre seu passado. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Filho do Noivo, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um homem solteiro por toda sua vida está prestes a se estabelecer com a noiva quando inesperadamente descobre que tem um filho de 13 anos. Ele não suporta crianças, então decide viajar com a criança por todo país à procura de sua mãe. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Ó Paí, Ó, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em um animado cortiço do centro histórico do Pelourinho, em Salvador, tudo é compartilhado pelos seus moradores, especialmente a paixão pelo Carnaval e a antipatia pela síndica do prédio, Dona Joana. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Allan - Uma Súbita Paixão, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. A amizade entre o comediante Matt e seu cachorro falante, Allan, fica abalada quando os dois se apaixonam pela mesma garota. Se antes eles queriam conquistar Hollywood juntos, agora cada um segue seu rumo. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Donnie Darko, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Donnie Darko não se dá bem com sua família, seus professores ou seus colegas de classe, mas acaba encontrando uma amiga em Gretchen. Seu outro amigo, porém, não é tão confiável assim: trata-se de Frank, um coelho gigante que só ele pode ver. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Garota em Chamas - Rebelião, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Ela perdeu a memória ainda jovem, mas essas lembranças escondem segredos sombrios. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Minúsculos - O Filme, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em meio aos restos de um piquenique, uma joaninha ajuda formigas negras em uma divertida batalha por açúcar contra formigas vermelhas. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: 2020. Os atacantes são membros da clã Kurama da Aldeia Oculta da Folha. Naruto e os outros vão à vila para proteger Yakumo. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Missão Ultra Secreta De Kurenai: A Promessa Ao Terceiro Hokage

programme.title: 2020. Naruto vai para o hospital, quando Unkai, o ninja que os atacou na vila, aparece. Eles procuram pela aldeia e chegam a uma teoria baseada nos movimentos dos insetos parasitas de Shino. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Genjutsu Ou Realidade? - T01E206

programme.desc: Naruto: A Habilidade Supostamente Selada - T01E207

programme.desc: Naruto: O Inimigo: O Ninja Renegado - T01E209

programme.title: 2020. Depois de evadir a emboscada dos Ninjas Renegados, Naruto, Gantetsu e Todoroki acabam num labirinto de floresta que confunde o senso de direção humana. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Desconcertante Floresta - T01E210

programme.title: 2020. O relacionamento entre Gantetsu e Todoroki é revelado, e a tensão entre os dois aumenta. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Recordação Das Chamas - T01E211

programme.title: 2023. Só falta um minuto de duelo, até que o perdedor seja enviado para afundar nas profundezas do mar! Será que estes grandes amigos levarão um ao outro à perdição? Pode ser que haja uma salvadora especial, que acabou de recuperar a visão... Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E29

programme.title: 2023. É a batalha dos espectros, e Bakura libera seu exército de fantasmas contra os zumbis devotos de Bonz, em busca do direito de entrar nos Duelos Finais da Cidade de Batalhas! Mas para quem o sino final tocará quando este duelo se der no Reino das Sombras? Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E30

programme.title: 2023. É o jogo do amor, quando o galã de Hollywood Jean-Claude Magnum desafia Mai para um duelo para ganhar sua mão em casamento! Será que Mai sucumbirá ao charme de Jean-Claude, para não mencionar sua esquadra de monstros-ninja? Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E31

programme.title: 2023. Que comecem os Duelos Finais da Cidade de Batalhas! A habilidade e resistência dos oito finalistas serão testadas ao extremo em uma arena de duelos suspensa a 300 metros de altura! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E32

programme.title: 2023. É o primeiro dos Duelos Finais da Cidade de Batalhas, e Yugi luta contra o espírito maligno do Anel do Milênio, que possui Bakura! Yugi destrói os espectros grotescos de Bakura rapidamente, mas Bakura tem uma estratégia saída direto do cemitério... Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: Revelado o Espírito Escuro: Yugi vs. Bakura, Parte 1
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E33

programme.title: 2023. Bakura aciona a Tábua do Destino, que fará Yugi perder automaticamente em cinco turnos! Como se isso já não fosse ruim, o Santuário das Trevas de Bakura afeta os pontos de vida de Yugi a cada ataque! Incapaz de atacar e ficando sem tempo, Yugi está preso! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: Revelado o Espírito Escuro: Yugi vs. Bakura, Parte 2
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E34

programme.title: 2023. Slifer, o Dragão Celeste de Yugi expelirá seu último sopro e vencerá o duelo, mas Bakura poderá não sobreviver a rajada do todo-poderoso Monstro Deus Egípcio! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: Revelado o Espírito Escuro: Yugi vs. Bakura, Parte 3
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E35

programme.title: 2023. A origem das Cartas dos Deuses Egípcios é finalmente revelada! O misterioso Shadi leva Yugi a uma jornada de volta à criação de Duel Monsters... e os perigosos poderes com ela liberados! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E36

programme.title: 2023. No segundo dos Duelos Finais da Cidade de Batalhas, Odion, disfarçado de Marik, confunde Joey com várias armadilhas. No entanto, Joey tem Tornado Gigante, a defesa perfeita para a estratégia de Odion, que garante a vitória de Joey... Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E37

programme.title: 2023. A Encarnação de Apophis de Odion destrói brutalmente os monstros de Joey... e seus pontos de vida! Será que Joey pode usar eficientemente os monstros que ele ganhou antes, ou já está afobado demais para montar um contra-ataque bem-sucedido? Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E38

programme.title: 2023. É uma verdadeira comilança, e a Serket de Odion devora os monstros de Joey, mutando para estágios de evolução mais e mais poderosos! Como Joey pode derrotar a Serket se ela engole os monstros de Joey quando eles são invocados? Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E39

programme.title: 2023. Odion usa uma Carta Deus Egípcio falsa para invocar o terceiro Monstro Deus Egípcio, o Dragão Alado de Rá, e o usa para aniquilar o resto dos pontos de vida de Joey. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E40

programme.title: 2023. O terceiro dos Duelos Finais da Cidade de Batalhas, entre Mai e Marik, não é nada ordinário. É uma batalha no temido Reino das Sombras, onde perder pontos de vida equivale a perder memórias! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: Jogo de Mente: Mai vs. Marik, Parte 1
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E41

programme.title: 2023. Ao passo que Mai perde mais e mais memórias com o ataque implacável de Marik, ela perde confiança em suas habilidades para duelar. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: Jogo de Mente: Mai vs. Marik, Parte 2
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E42

programme.title: 2023. Mai ganha controle do Dragão Alado de Rá de Marik, mas é incapaz de decifrar como liberar suas habilidades extremamente poderosas! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: Jogo de Mente: Mai vs. Marik, Parte 3
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E43

programme.title: 2023. No quarto dos Duelos Finais da Cidade de Batalhas, o oponente misterioso de Kaiba é... Ishizu! Com o poder de seu Colar do Milênio, Ishizu pode ver o futuro, inclusive cada carta que Kaiba está planejando jogar! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: Um Duelo Contra o Destino: Kaiba vs. Ishizu, Parte 1
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E44

programme.title: 2023. Usando a mágica de seu Colar do Milênio, Ishizu já viu o resultado do duelo – ela derrotará Kaiba com sua armadilha! Como Kaiba pode vencer quando ele já está destinado a perder? É hora de Kaiba mudar o futuro! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: Um Duelo Contra o Destino: Kaiba vs. Ishizu, Parte 2
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E45

programme.title: 2023. Com a maldade de Marik crescendo, Ishizu revela os segredos da linhagem dela: como Marik passou a ser, de uma criança generosa, um tirano em busca de poder e do domínio mundial? Será que Yugi pode salvar Marik, ou ele está além da salvação? Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: O Segredo dos Guardiões da Tumba
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E46

programme.title: 2023. Com o pacto anterior quebrado, Bakura duela contra Marik pelo direito de controlar o Cetro do Milênio e o Anel do Milênio, e o perdedor ficará preso no Reino das Sombras para sempre! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: Confronto nas Sombras: Marik vs. Bakura, Parte 1
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E47

programme.title: 2023. Bakura e o Marik bom invocam o Dragão Alado de Rá, prontos para atacar e banir o Marik mau para o Reino das Sombras! Porém, o Dragão Alado de Rá tem mais de uma habilidade especial, e o Marik mau sabe como usar todas elas! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: Confronto nas Sombras: Marik vs. Bakura, Parte 1
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E48

programme.title: 2023. Enquanto acelera para a Ilha da KaibaCorp para as etapas finais do Torneio da Cidade de Batalhas, o dirigível de Kaiba é capturado por um jovem misterioso chamado Noah e seus capangas – cinco inimigos do passado de Yugi e Kaiba em busca de vingança. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Kunihisa Sugishima, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Toru Yamada
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T03E01

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: A Game of Shadows
programme.desc: The murder of Austrias crown prince leads Holmes (Robert Downey Jr.), Watson (Jude Law) and a Gypsy (Noomi Rapace) to a showdown with an evil genius named Moriarty (Jared Harris). Starring Robert Downey, Jude Law, Noomi Rapace.

programme.title: Outlander: Blood of my Blood
programme.desc: After the death of Red Jacob, a new Laird of Clan MacKenzie must be chosen and both of his sons, Colum and Dougal, vie for the title; at the Gathering, Brian Fraser and Ellen MacKenzie meet and are struck by their strong connection.

programme.title: Bagman
programme.desc: A father faces a childhood threat that resurfaces suddenly. He battles his deepest fear, not for himself, but to protect his family from the sinister danger. Starring Sam Claflin, Antonia Thomas, William Hope.

programme.title: At First Light
programme.desc: A close encounter with mysterious lights sends two teens on the run after one discovers she has extraordinary but dangerous powers. Starring Stefanie Scott, Theodore Pellerin, Said Taghmaoui.

programme.title: Grey Gardens
programme.desc: Former socialites Edith Bouvier Beale and daughter Edie, 56, become recluses in a decrepit New York mansion.

programme.title: The Sweet Hereafter
programme.desc: A lawyer (Ian Holm) seeks input from parents who lost children in a Canadian bus crash that claimed 14 lives. Starring Ian Holm, Sarah Polley, Bruce Greenwood.

programme.title: Kalinga (Care)
programme.desc: The stories of several Filipina caregivers and nannies in Vancouver, that bear witness to their sacrifices as they struggle to reunite with their children and families.

programme.title: Whale
programme.desc: A young boy is sent to live with his grandparents in a remote indigenous community. Starring Timmy Masso, Grace George, Joe Martin.

programme.title: Ballerina
programme.desc: A look at the Australian Ballets first aboriginal dancer and her impact on the industry. Featuring interviews, dance sequences, and archive footage that showcases how Ella remains grounded in her own culture while performing.

programme.title: Superman II
programme.desc: The Man of Steel (Christopher Reeve) gets serious with Lois Lane (Margot Kidder) and fights three Krypton outcasts in league with Lex Luthor (Gene Hackman). Starring Christopher Reeve, Margot Kidder, Gene Hackman.

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: The Caped Crusader (Michael Keaton) saves dismal Gotham City and gorgeous Vicki Vale (Kim Basinger) from the freaky Joker (Jack Nicholson). Starring Jack Nicholson, Michael Keaton, Kim Basinger.

programme.title: Hulk
programme.desc: Bruce Banner, a genetics researcher with a tragic past, suffers an accident that causes him to transform into a raging green monster when he gets angry. Starring Eric Bana, Jennifer Connelly, Sam Elliott.

programme.title: Wonder Woman
programme.desc: After leaving her island for the first time, Wonder Woman discovers her full powers and true destiny while fighting alongside men in a war to end all wars. Starring Gal Gadot, Chris Pine, Connie Nielsen.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
programme.desc: Under the watchful eye of mentor Tony Stark, high school student Peter Parker starts to embrace his newfound identity as Spider-Man to battle the evil Vulture. Starring Tom Holland, Michael Keaton, Robert Downey.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: A demon raised from infancy after being conjured by and rescued from the Nazis, grows up to become a defender against the forces of darkness. Starring Ron Perlman, John Hurt, Selma Blair.

programme.title: The Shape of Water
programme.desc: Elisa is a mute, isolated woman who works in a hidden, high-security government laboratory. Her life changes forever when she discovers the labs classified secret -- a mysterious, scaled creature from South America that lives in a water tank. Starring Sally Hawkins, Michael Shannon, Richard Jenkins.

programme.title: Splice
programme.desc: An experiment goes horribly wrong when two scientists (Adrien Brody, Sarah Polley) use human DNA to create a hybrid creature. Starring Adrien Brody, Sarah Polley, Delphine Chaneac.

programme.title: Running on Empty
programme.desc: Mort discovers he has less than a year to live. After his fiance leaves him, he meets Kate on a dating service that matches people by their death dates, all while being stalked by a crazy pimp. Starring Keir Gilchrist, Lucy Hale, Francesca Eastwood.

programme.title: Barbarian
programme.desc: A young woman discovers the rental home she booked is already occupied by a stranger. Against her better judgment, she decides to spend the night but soon discovers theres a lot more to fear than just an unexpected house guest. Starring Georgina Campbell, Bill Skarsgård, Justin Long.

programme.title: 28 Weeks Later
programme.desc: As the U.S. Army tries to restore order, a carrier of rage virus enters London and reinfects the populace. Starring Robert Carlyle, Rose Byrne, Jeremy Renner.

programme.title: The Nut Job
programme.desc: A mischievous squirrel and his sidekick assemble a ragtag animal crew to get inside their towns nut shop and steal enough food for the winter. Starring Will Arnett, Brendan Fraser, Liam Neeson.

programme.title: The Nut Job 2: Nutty by Nature
programme.desc: Surly the squirrel and his animal pals find out that the corrupt mayor of Oakton plans to bulldoze their beloved park. Hoping to save the place they call home, the gang joins forces with a cute mouse who happens to be a fierce master of kung fu. Starring Will Arnett, Katherine Heigl, Maya Rudolph.

programme.title: The Boxtrolls
programme.desc: A boy (Isaac Hempstead-Wright) and his new friend (Elle Fanning) hatch a plan to save a community of mischievous cavern-dwellers from the villainous townsman (Ben Kingsley) who plans to exterminate them. Starring Isaac Hempstead-Wright, Elle Fanning, Ben Kingsley.

programme.title: Gnomeo and Juliet
programme.desc: Love-struck garden gnomes (James McAvoy, Emily Blunt) become part of a feud between rival neighbors in Stratford-Upon-Avon, Shakespeares birthplace. Starring James McAvoy, Emily Blunt, Michael Caine.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: The archer and his Moorish companion join Sherwood Forest outlaws to fight against the sheriff of Nottingham, who desires to possess Maid Marian. Starring Kevin Costner, Morgan Freeman, Mary Elizabeth Mastrantonio.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: When Captain James Hook kidnaps his children, an adult Peter Pan must return to Neverland and reclaim his youthful spirit in order to challenge his old enemy. Starring Dustin Hoffman, Robin Williams, Julia Roberts.

programme.title: Finding Neverland
programme.desc: Writer J.M. Barrie (Johnny Depp) befriends a widow (Kate Winslet) and her four sons who inspire him to create the character Peter Pan. Starring Johnny Depp, Kate Winslet, Julie Christie.

programme.title: Lion
programme.desc: Accidentally separated from his family as a child, Saroo Brierley returns to India 25 years later to find them. Starring Dev Patel, Rooney Mara, David Wenham.

programme.title: Outlander: Blood of my Blood
programme.desc: After the death of Red Jacob, a new Laird of Clan MacKenzie must be chosen and both of his sons, Colum and Dougal, vie for the title; at the Gathering, Brian Fraser and Ellen MacKenzie meet and are struck by their strong connection.

programme.title: The Other Boleyn Girl
programme.desc: Family ambition pits British sisters Anne (Natalie Portman) and Mary (Scarlett Johansson) Boleyn against each other for the affections of King Henry VIII. Starring Natalie Portman, Scarlett Johansson, Eric Bana.

programme.title: Incendies
programme.desc: A womans last request sends her twin children to the Middle East to find their roots. Starring Lubna Azabal, Melissa Desormeaux-Poulin, Maxim Gaudette.

programme.title: Inside
programme.desc: A high-end art thief becomes trapped inside a luxury, high-tech penthouse in New Yorks Times Square after his heist doesnt go as planned. Locked inside with nothing but priceless works of art, he must use all his cunning and invention to survive. Starring Willem Dafoe, Gene Bervoets, Eliza Stuyck.

programme.title: Lemonade
programme.desc: A young Romanian woman moves to the United States with her son after she marries an American man she hardly knows. Starring Malina Manovici, Dylan Smith, Steve Bacic.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will and Henrys double date goes awry when Magnus insists they do a routine delivery of an Abnormal en route.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus and Tesla investigate a former Praxian stronghold and realize they may have stumbled upon secrets to the Vampiris race.

programme.title: Puppy Swap: Love Unleashed
programme.desc: An engaged couple adopts two puppies. When they decide to split up, the puppies hatch a plan to bring the two back together. Starring Sara Fletcher, Rib Hillis, Corin Nemec.

programme.title: ParaNorman
programme.desc: A ghoul-whispering youngster (Kodi Smit-McPhee) battles zombies, ghosts, witches and ignorant adults to save his town from an ancient curse. Starring Kodi Smit-McPhee, Tucker Albrizzi, Anna Kendrick.

programme.title: Weathering With You
programme.desc: A boy runs away to Tokyo and befriends a girl who appears to be able to manipulate the weather. Starring Brandon Engman, Ashley Boettcher, Alison Brie.

programme.title: Drink Slay Love
programme.desc: A 16-year old vampire discovers she has the ability to withstand sunlight. Sensing an opportunity to round up new victims, her family enrolls her in high school, where her who-cares attitude quickly makes her the coolest girl around. Starring Cierra Ramirez, Angelique Rivera, Gregg Sulkin.

programme.title: Escape From Planet Earth
programme.desc: A heroic astronaut (Brendan Fraser) dashes off on an ill-advised rescue mission. After he becomes caught in a fiendish trap, he must rely on his nerdy brother (Rob Corddry) to save him. Starring Rob Corddry, Brendan Fraser, Sarah Jessica Parker.

programme.title: Deep
programme.desc: When his colony is threatened by an accident, a mischievous octopus named Deep is sent to find help. His best friends, a sassy shrimp and a nervous anglerfish, join him on the perilous journey. Starring Justin Felbinger, Stephen Ezra Hughes, Lindsey Alena.

programme.title: Where the Wild Things Are
programme.desc: Sent to bed without supper, a mischievous boy enters a land that grows out of his imagination and becomes king of the fantastic creatures who live there. Starring Catherine Keener, Max Records, Mark Ruffalo.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Armed with proton packs and plenty of attitude, four women (Melissa McCarthy, Kristen Wiig, Leslie Jones, Kate McKinnon) prepare for an epic battle as mischievous ghosts start to wreak havoc in New York. Starring Melissa McCarthy, Kristen Wiig, Leslie Jones.

programme.title: I, Tonya
programme.desc: In 1991, talented figure skater Tonya Harding becomes the first American woman to complete a triple axel during a competition. In 1994, her world comes crashing down when her ex-husband conspires to injure fellow Olympic hopeful Nancy Kerrigan. Starring Margot Robbie, Sebastian Stan, Allison Janney.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: Grieving writer Gia decides to write a book about womens desire; she interviews entrepreneur Sloane, homemaker Lina and student Maggie as they overturn their lives.

programme.title: Three Women
programme.desc: Lina flees from a stagnant marriage and a body of pain; she joins a womens group at Doctor Henrys, tries to reconnect with the love of her life, and begins a friendship with Gia.

programme.title: Edge of Winter
programme.desc: Stranded at a remote cabin in the wintertime, two siblings (Tom Holland, Percy Hynes White) must fight for survival as their increasingly unhinged father (Joel Kinnaman) loses his grip on reality. Starring Joel Kinnaman, Tom Holland, Percy Hynes White.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: A socially awkward teen decides to import a mail-order best friend from France. Instead, he ends up with his personal nightmare: a cologne-soaked, chain-smoking, sex-obsessed youth who quickly becomes the hero of the community. Starring Ed Oxenbould, Avan Jogia, Justin Hartley.

programme.title: Mutiny on the Bounty
programme.desc: First mate Mr. Christian (Clark Gable) and his 18th-century shipmates overthrow cruel Capt. Bligh (Charles Laughton) and set him adrift in the Pacific. Starring Charles Laughton, Clark Gable, Franchot Tone.

programme.title: 12 Angry Men
programme.desc: One (Henry Fonda) of 12 jurors holds out in the case of a boy from the slums who is accused of killing his father. Starring Henry Fonda, Lee J. Cobb, Ed Begley.

programme.title: Witness for the Prosecution
programme.desc: An aging barrister (Charles Laughton) defends a man (Tyrone Power) for murder despite damaging testimony from the accuseds wife (Marlene Dietrich). Starring Tyrone Power, Marlene Dietrich, Charles Laughton.

programme.title: Judgment at Nuremberg
programme.desc: Stanley Kramers Oscar-winning account reveals postwar courtroom proceedings against Nazi war criminals in 1948 Germany. Starring Spencer Tracy, Burt Lancaster, Richard Widmark.

programme.title: Adams Rib
programme.desc: Married lawyers (Spencer Tracy, Katharine Hepburn) clash in and out of court over a womans (Judy Holliday) right to shoot her husband and his lover. Starring Spencer Tracy, Katharine Hepburn, Judy Holliday.

programme.title: Cimarron
programme.desc: Husband-and-wife homesteaders (Richard Dix, Irene Dunne) join the Oklahoma land rush of 1889 and stay on to build an empire. Starring Richard Dix, Irene Dunne, Estelle Taylor.

programme.title: How the West Was Won
programme.desc: The history of 19th-century Western expansion, as seen through the lives of three generations of a pioneer family. Starring Carroll Baker, Lee J. Cobb, Henry Fonda.

programme.title: Calamity Jane
programme.desc: Wild West sharpshooter Jane (Doris Day) falls for Wild Bill Hickok (Howard Keel) and tries to act more ladylike. Starring Doris Day, Howard Keel, Allyn Ann McLerie.

programme.title: Stagecoach
programme.desc: An outlaw (John Wayne), a prostitute (Claire Trevor), a drunken doctor and assorted others go through Indian country. Starring John Wayne, Claire Trevor, Andy Devine.

programme.title: Red River
programme.desc: A cattle baron (John Wayne) fights with his foster son (Montgomery Clift) on the first cattle drive up the Chisholm Trail. Starring John Wayne, Montgomery Clift, Walter Brennan.

programme.title: The Naked Spur
programme.desc: A bounty hunter (James Stewart) has competition for an outlaws daughter (Janet Leigh) and a cornered killer (Robert Ryan). Starring James Stewart, Janet Leigh, Robert Ryan.

programme.title: Broken Arrow
programme.desc: A lone frontiersman (James Stewart) risks his life to forge peace between Arizona settlers and Cochises (Jeff Chandler) Apache nation. Starring James Stewart, Jeff Chandler, Debra Paget.

programme.title: Shane
programme.desc: An ex-gunfighter (Alan Ladd) sides with Wyoming homesteaders (Jean Arthur, Van Heflin) against a ruthless cattle baron. Starring Alan Ladd, Jean Arthur, Van Heflin.

programme.title: Hondo
programme.desc: An Indian scout attempts to escort a homesteaders wife and her son back to safety after her husband deserts her during an Apache attack. When she refuses to go, he stays on to help and, over time, forms a strong bond with both her and her son. Starring John Wayne, Geraldine Page, Ward Bond.

programme.title: McCabe and Mrs. Miller
programme.desc: A frontier gambler (Warren Beatty) and a madam (Julie Christie) protect their booming business from outside investors. Starring Warren Beatty, Julie Christie, Rene Auberjonois.

programme.title: The Wild Bunch
programme.desc: An outlaw (William Holden) and his gang, on the run from the Mexican Army and bounty hunters, plot to rob a United States Army train. Starring William Holden, Ernest Borgnine, Robert Ryan.

programme.title: Billy the Kid
programme.desc: The Wild West outlaw (Robert Taylor) rides into town and faces a childhood friend turned territorial marshal (Brian Donlevy). Starring Robert Taylor, Brian Donlevy, Ian Hunter.

programme.title: Hollywood Canteen
programme.desc: A GI (Robert Hutton) back from the South Pacific wins a canteen raffle and meets his dream girl (Joan Leslie), as Warner Bros. stars perform. Starring Robert Hutton, Joan Leslie, Dane Clark.

programme.title: Flying Down to Rio
programme.desc: A bandleader (Gene Raymond) woos a Latin flame (Dolores del Río) who is already engaged to his employer. The film features the first screen pairing of Fred Astaire and Ginger Rogers. Starring Dolores del Río, Gene Raymond, Raul Roulien.

programme.title: Born to Dance
programme.desc: A tap-dancing understudy (Eleanor Powell) meets a sailor (James Stewart) on leave and replaces the star (Virginia Bruce) of a show. Starring Eleanor Powell, James Stewart, Virginia Bruce.

programme.title: Swing Time
programme.desc: Gambler/dancer Lucky (Fred Astaire) falls for dance teacher Penny (Ginger Rogers) while engaged to Margaret. Starring Fred Astaire, Ginger Rogers, Victor Moore.

programme.title: Royal Wedding
programme.desc: A brother (Fred Astaire) and sister (Jane Powell) take their act to 1947 London. Includes Astaires famous dance on the ceiling. Starring Fred Astaire, Jane Powell, Peter Lawford.

programme.title: The Band Wagon
programme.desc: Two playwrights bring a movie dancer (Fred Astaire) to New York for a Broadway show with a ballerina (Cyd Charisse). Starring Fred Astaire, Cyd Charisse, Oscar Levant.

programme.title: Seven Brides for Seven Brothers
programme.desc: When an Oregon trapper decides to marry, his six rowdy brothers aim to follow suit, though not one has a sweetheart yet. Starring Howard Keel, Jane Powell, Russ Tamblyn.

programme.title: West Side Story
programme.desc: Against a backdrop of vicious gang warfare between the New Yorker Jets and the Puerto Rican Sharks, a romance develops across rival lines. 1960s update of "Romeo and Juliet", with amazing song and dance sequences. Starring Natalie Wood, Richard Beymer, Russ Tamblyn.

programme.title: All That Jazz
programme.desc: A Broadway choreographer (Roy Scheider) chain-smokes, pops pills and overworks his way to open-heart surgery. Starring Roy Scheider, Jessica Lange, Ann Reinking.

programme.title: The Red Shoes
programme.desc: A ballerina (Moira Shearer) loves a ballet composer (Marius Goring) but dances for an obsessive impresario (Anton Walbrook). Starring Moira Shearer, Anton Walbrook, Marius Goring.

programme.title: Fame
programme.desc: Leroy, Coco (Irene Cara), Bruno (Lee Curreri) and others of mixed talents and means attend New Yorks High School of Performing Arts. Starring Irene Cara, Eddie Barth, Lee Curreri.

programme.title: Algiers
programme.desc: A Paris thief who is hiding in the Casbah meets a woman who reminds him of home. Starring Charles Boyer, Hedy Lamarr, Sigrid Gurie.

programme.title: Odd Man Out
programme.desc: Belfast police conduct a door-to-door manhunt for an IRA gunman (James Mason) wounded in a daring robbery. Starring James Mason, Robert Newton, Kathleen Ryan.

programme.title: Logans Run
programme.desc: In a society where life ends at age 30, a law enforcement officer known as a Sandman (Michael York) flees with another 30-year-old (Jenny Agutter) when he learns his number has come up prematurely. Starring Michael York, Jenny Agutter, Richard Jordan.

programme.title: Running on Empty
programme.desc: Two former 60s radicals (Christine Lahti, Judd Hirsch) live underground with their sons, one of whom (River Phoenix) wants to stop running. Starring Christine Lahti, River Phoenix, Judd Hirsch.

programme.title: I Am a Fugitive From a Chain Gang
programme.desc: An innocent man is sent to a prison farm, where he endures the dehumanizing effects of a cruel criminal justice system. Starring Paul Muni, Glenda Farrell, Helen Vinson.

programme.title: The Defiant Ones
programme.desc: Two men (Tony Curtis, Sidney Poitier) of different races, who hate each other, escape from a chain gang shackled together. Starring Tony Curtis, Sidney Poitier, Theodore Bikel.

programme.title: North by Northwest
programme.desc: Mistaken identity spurs a foreign spy (James Mason) to pursue an innocent New Yorker (Cary Grant), all the way to Mount Rushmore. Starring Cary Grant, Eva Marie Saint, James Mason.

programme.title: The Harder They Fall
programme.desc: A fight promoter (Rod Steiger) hires a hard-luck sportswriter (Humphrey Bogart) to hype a simple Argentine boxer for the mob. Starring Humphrey Bogart, Rod Steiger, Jan Sterling.

programme.title: Fat City
programme.desc: A young fighter (Jeff Bridges) inspires a boozing ex-boxer (Stacy Keach) working as a fruit picker to try a comeback. Starring Stacy Keach, Jeff Bridges, Susan Tyrrell.

programme.title: Champion
programme.desc: A boxer (Kirk Douglas) uses women, mobsters and his disabled brother (Arthur Kennedy) to get the middleweight title. Starring Kirk Douglas, Marilyn Maxwell, Arthur Kennedy.

programme.title: Golden Boy
programme.desc: A violinist (William Holden) turns boxer, egged on by his managers (Adolphe Menjou) girlfriend (Barbara Stanwyck). Starring Barbara Stanwyck, Adolphe Menjou, William Holden.

programme.title: The Nature of Things
programme.desc: Canadians push the limits of cold endurance; baby harp seals brave icy waters; flying squirrels.

programme.title: Village of the Missing
programme.desc: Between 2010 and 2017, several men vanish from Torontos LGBTQ neighborhood, The Village, but it isnt until eight years later that police arrest Bruce McArthur, 66, on murder charges.

programme.title: The Climate Baby Dilemma
programme.desc: For a growing number of young people, the climate crisis is affecting decisions about whether to have kids.

programme.desc: African-American female performers changed American culture through their films; fashion; music; politics.
